headline: 3 Dirt Cheap Healthcare Shares Under $30 to Buy Right Now
summary: Healthcare has been an unloved corner of the market in 2026, but that neglect has created a rare setup: quality names trading in single-digit and low-double-digit territory while still throwing off cash, growing earnings, and reaffirming guidance.
